narrative:
Dudley (precinct in Noble County) has 371 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.1 percentage points.
